pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Windows 11 Chinese Simplified system fonts. These fonts are extracted from official Windows 11 ISO images and repackaged by the liblaf/win-fonts project.
Includes TrueType (.ttf) and TrueType Collection (.ttc) fonts: Microsoft YaHei (微软雅黑), SimSun (宋体), SimHei (黑体), KaiTi (楷体), FangSong (仿宋), and other Chinese Simplified Windows system fonts.
